textContent:
Kasama ko raw si Sinead. Naglalakad kami sa fictional version ng villa alicia, idk pauwi siguro ng bahay. Nag-uusap kami about how I bumped into Jonel when I was with other people and was trying to say na it was awkward, pero sinabi agad ni Sinead na okay lang naman na it's socializing.

Tapos nung malapit na kami sa bahay nila, for some reason maraming bubuyog. Big ones too, like spherical ones. So tumakbo kami agad para marating yung backdoor ng bahay nila. So pagkapasok namin sa bahay biglang may babae na umano, baka tita ni Sinead pero i don't recognize the face. Pinakilala ako ni Sinead tapos sabi nya "Ah ikaw pala yung Ian." Merong staircase that surrounds the whole room and if u look up ull see several floors. Pagkasabi ng tita ni Sinead na yun, tumawa lang ako awkwardly tapos sabi ko "Hello po." Nakita ko may maliit na kuting sila Sinead sa sofa, tapos nung ipe-pet ko na sana nagsibabaan yung mga pinsan ni Sinead go see the commotion below, and to look at me. 

Tapos nag-alarm yung phone.
title: Sinead dream x
textContentHtml:
Kasama ko raw si Sinead. Naglalakad kami sa fictional version ng villa alicia, idk pauwi siguro ng bahay. Nag-uusap kami about how I bumped into Jonel when I was with other people and was trying to say na it was awkward, pero sinabi agad ni Sinead na okay lang naman na it's socializing.


Tapos nung malapit na kami sa bahay nila, for some reason maraming bubuyog. Big ones too, like spherical ones. So tumakbo kami agad para marating yung backdoor ng bahay nila. So pagkapasok namin sa bahay biglang may babae na umano, baka tita ni Sinead pero i don't recognize the face. Pinakilala ako ni Sinead tapos sabi nya "Ah ikaw pala yung Ian." Merong staircase that surrounds the whole room and if u look up ull see several floors. Pagkasabi ng tita ni Sinead na yun, tumawa lang ako awkwardly tapos sabi ko "Hello po." Nakita ko may maliit na kuting sila Sinead sa sofa, tapos nung ipe-pet ko na sana nagsibabaan yung mga pinsan ni Sinead go see the commotion below, and to look at me. 


Tapos nag-alarm yung phone.
